title: Syracuse lacrosse moves up in poll, setting up Top 3 matchup at UNC
summary: Syracuse University men's lacrosse team advanced in national rankings, positioning for a competitive ACC matchup. This article covers collegiate athletics and has no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations or the Chief Innovation Officer's policy domain.
processing_notes: Article concerns collegiate athletics, not municipal government
